stepper_ctrl_init.message0: Initialize stepper motor %1 Pulse pin %2 Direction pin %3 Speed (μs) %4 Front limit pin %5 Rear limit pin %6
stepper_ctrl_init.tooltip: Initialize stepper motor controller, configure pins and speed

stepper_ctrl_start.tooltip: Start the stepper motor after setting the target number of steps and direction

stepper_ctrl_set_speed.tooltip: Set the step pulse interval (microseconds). The smaller the value, the faster the speed. The range is 200~5000.

stepper_ctrl_set_rpm.tooltip: Set speed by RPM and steps per revolution

stepper_ctrl_tick.tooltip: Called in the loop, drive the motor and automatically detect limits and targets

stepper_ctrl_is_running.tooltip: Determine whether the stepper motor is running

stepper_ctrl_get_steps.tooltip: Get the current number of steps taken

stepper_ctrl_is_front_limit.tooltip: Determine whether the front limit switch is triggered

stepper_ctrl_is_back_limit.tooltip: Determine whether the rear limit switch is triggered

stepper_ctrl_on_target_done.message0: When %1 target number of steps is completed
stepper_ctrl_on_target_done.tooltip: Event: Triggered when the target number of steps is completed

stepper_ctrl_on_front_limit.tooltip: Event: When the front limit switch is triggered

stepper_ctrl_on_back_limit.tooltip: Event: When the rear limit switch is triggered

toolbox_name: STM32 stepper motor control shortcut module
